title: Coffee R Us — Admin Portal
description: A React admin portal for an e-commerce store: view inventory, search products, update pricing, and add new products. Built with custom hooks, client-side routing, and a full Vitest/React Testing Library test suite.

title: Personal Finance Tracker
description: A personal finance tool to track monthly income and expenses. Color-coded transactions, category badges, and a live dashboard showing balance, income, and expenses at a glance.

title: Bakery Project Management CLI
description: A Python command-line tool for managing users, projects, and tasks. Role-based auth with password hashing, OOP design, JSON persistence, and a full pytest suite.
